mapper.select:
SELECT hl.id, hl.name, hl.employee_id, he.name AS employee_name, hl.holiday_status_id, hl.date_from, hl.date_to, hl.number_of_days, hl.state FROM hr_leave hl LEFT JOIN hr_employee he ON hl.employee_id = he.id
AND (hl.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND he.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.employeeName}, '%')
ORDER BY hl.id DESC
